title: to verify user is able to login into the system with otp flow
description: Manual test case: to verify user is able to login into the system with otp flow
preconditions: Manual test case created by user

steps.description: Tap on Allow button if permission popup apears.
Enter a valid mobile number. Use 2022123418 for testing pupose.
Now enter the OTP received on phone. For testing number use last 4 digits as otp.

expected_result: User should be logged into the system.
